lobe.name: Svrn7.Notifications
lobe.title: SVRN7 Notifications LOBE
lobe.description: Net-new DIDComm notification protocol. Dispatches typed alerts to citizen UX endpoints and monitors internal TDA health thresholds.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Alert Notification
protocols.description: Typed alert message sent to a citizen or Society endpoint. Body: { alertType, severity, message, resourceDid }

cmdlets.name: Invoke-TdaNotification
cmdlets.title: Process Inbound Notification
cmdlets.description: Processes an inbound notification/1.0/alert and returns an alert record for logging or further handling.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}

cmdlets.name: Send-TdaAlert
cmdlets.title: Send Alert
cmdlets.description: Dispatches a typed notification/1.0/alert to a recipient DID. Returns an OutboundMessage.

ResourceDid.description: Optional DID URL of the resource that triggered the alert.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

cmdlets.name: Test-TdaInboxDepth
cmdlets.title: Check Inbox Depth Threshold
cmdlets.description: Checks if the pending inbox count exceeds the configured threshold and fires an alert if so. Call periodically from Agent 1.

outputSchema.description: No output. Side effect: may enqueue an alert OutboundMessage.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Dispatches and receives typed alerts across the VTC7 mesh. Useful for monitoring wallet balance changes, VC expiry warnings, inbox depth, and custom Society events.
useCases: Notifying a citizen when their wallet balance changes
Alerting a Society operator when inbox depth is high
Sending VC expiry warnings 7 days before expiry
compositionHints: Send-TdaAlert -AlertType BalanceChange is the correct cmdlet after any Invoke-Svrn7Transfer
Test-TdaInboxDepth should be called periodically from Agent1-Coordinator, not in response to a specific message
ResourceDid in Send-TdaAlert should be the DID URL of the affected record (e.g., the wallet DID URL)
limitations: No persistent notification store in Epoch 0 — undeliverable alerts are discarded after Polly retry exhaustion.
